projectDescription: Goleme is an AI-powered website builder that lets anyone create, launch, and manage a website by simply describing what they want in plain language.
keyFeatures: AI-powered website generation from plain-language descriptions
Starter templates for common website types (salon, blog, e-shop, craftsman)
Chat-based editing — update any part of your site through conversation
Credit-based AI usage with top-up wallet
No coding or technical skills required
publicApiSurface: AI chat interface for site creation and editing
Template picker (Hair Salon, Travel Blog, E-Shop, Craftsman)
Project dashboard (manage up to 3–10 sites depending on plan)
Account registration via email/password or Google OAuth
